title: Quick-log drafts
description: A natural-language quick-log the user typed (e.g. 'slept 6.5h, weight 82kg, took atorvastatin, mild headache'). The logger parses it into a structured, reviewable set of proposedActions; nothing is written to the real tables until the user confirms in the UI (confirm-before-write).

text.description: the raw free-text the user typed or dictated

proposedActions.description: array of structured writes the logger parsed out, each { table, values, summary } — a preview only, never auto-applied

note.description: the logger's plain-language summary of what it understood, or an error/clarification message
